mapper.select:
SELECT id, sku, product_id as "productId", variant_id as "variantId", available_quantity as "availableQuantity", reserved_quantity as "reserved", status, "stateId" as "stateId" FROM inventory_item
AND product_id = #{productId} AND variant_id = #{variantId}

SELECT id, sku, asin, product_id as "productId", variant_id as "variantId", quantity, available_quantity as "availableQuantity", reserved_quantity as "reserved", damaged_quantity as "damagedQuantity", inbound_quantity as "inboundQuantity", low_stock_threshold as "lowStockThreshold", status, primary_fc as "primaryFc", is_fba as "isFba", is_merchant_fulfilled as "isMerchantFulfilled", "stateId" as "stateId" FROM inventory_item WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT id, sku, product_id as "productId", variant_id as "variantId", quantity, available_quantity as "availableQuantity", reserved_quantity as "reserved", damaged_quantity as "damagedQuantity", low_stock_threshold as "lowStockThreshold", status, primary_fc as "primaryFc", "stateId" as "stateId" FROM inventory_item WHERE product_id = #{productId}
SELECT "stateId" as "stateId", COUNT(*) as "count" FROM inventory_item GROUP BY "stateId" ORDER BY "count" DESC
SELECT count(*) FROM inventory_item WHERE available_quantity > 0 AND available_quantity <= low_stock_threshold AND "stateId" = 'IN_WAREHOUSE'

SELECT id, sku, product_id as "productId", variant_id as "variantId", quantity, available_quantity as "availableQuantity", reserved_quantity as "reserved", low_stock_threshold as "lowStockThreshold", status, primary_fc as "primaryFc", "stateId" as "stateId" FROM inventory_item WHERE available_quantity > 0 AND available_quantity <= low_stock_threshold AND "stateId" = 'IN_WAREHOUSE' ${orderby} ${pagination}

SELECT id, sku, product_id as "productId", variant_id as "variantId", quantity, available_quantity as "availableQuantity", status, primary_fc as "primaryFc", "stateId" as "stateId" FROM inventory_item WHERE "stateId" = 'OUT_OF_STOCK' ${orderby} ${pagination}

SELECT primary_fc as "fulfillmentCenter", COUNT(*) as "itemCount", SUM(quantity) as "totalQuantity", SUM(available_quantity) as "totalAvailable", SUM(reserved_quantity) as "totalReserved", SUM(damaged_quantity) as "totalDamaged" FROM inventory_item GROUP BY primary_fc ORDER BY primary_fc

SELECT r.inventory_item_id as "inventoryItemId", i.sku as "sku", i.product_id as "productId", r.order_id as "orderId", r.quantity as "quantity", r.reserved_at as "reservedAt", r.expires_at as "expiresAt", r.status as "status" FROM inventory_reservations r JOIN inventory_item i ON r.inventory_item_id = i.id WHERE r.status = 'RESERVED' ORDER BY r.reserved_at DESC
